title: Numbers
content:
The new Apple's spreadsheet, [Numbers](http://www.apple.com/iwork/numbers/), is COOOL!

Time for me to ditch _Microsoft Excel_. :)

Now, I wonder when will iWork'08 be available over here.

**Update**

Thanks to the link from K.Menn, now let the trial begun. ;)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/08/iwork08trial.jpg)
